## Phase 0 objective

Which explicit Phase 0 objective does this change satisfy?

## Changed files

List the changed files and components.

## Introduced complexity

What new dependency, runtime behavior, state, or operational burden was introduced? Write `None` when applicable.

## Tests and evidence

List added or changed tests and their results. Include runtime proof where relevant.

## Cost

State expected infrastructure, provider, storage, and operational cost. Use integer cents where a monetary value exists.

## Explicit non-goals

List the intentionally unimplemented behavior.

## ADR decision

- [ ] No architecture decision changed.
- [ ] An ADR is required and included.

## Rule compliance

- [ ] The 32 rules in `docs/CODEX_RULES.md` were reviewed and followed.
- [ ] No secret or populated environment file is included.
- [ ] No anonymous write path was added.
- [ ] No direct workflow-state mutation was added.
- [ ] No forbidden dependency or external provider integration was added.
- [ ] Rollback and data-cleanup implications are documented.
